case.prediction_format: Return ranked root causes as objects with `time` as Unix seconds, `component` as a candidate root cause service, and `reason` as a candidate root cause metric.

reasoner.analysis: Checked 60-150s emailservice metrics. Latency.p50/p90 dev=+1.7 in 90-120s window confirms latency anomaly. Traces show normal latency (dev=-0.6) and call counts. Root cause remains emailservice_latency.
